title: XP Sword
description: This a mod I made for a couple of my friends AS A JOKE
body:
### The Progressional Impairment Sword (P.I.S.)

This mod, born purely out of spite and boredom, adds one item: **The XP Sword**.

**Note:** This mod is undeniably **Stupid**, actively **Barely Balanced**, and overall **Not Worth It**. Proceed with caution (or, ideally, don't).

#### How it "Works":

Wielding this monstrosity turns standard combat into a game of **XP Roulette**. Every single hit on an enemy will grant the player a random, unpredictable amount of experience points—from a frustratingly small trickle to an immediate, unearned level surge.

But, because we believe in fairness (the unfair kind), the sword also includes a small, special chance to suddenly **subtract a significant chunk of your current XP level** just to keep you humble. It's the only sword that actively fights its wielder's progress.

**Have fun!** (You won't.)
